title: CoQ10 for Brain Health After 40: What the Research Actually Shows
seo_title: CoQ10 for Brain Health After 40: What Research Shows
meta_description: CoQ10 levels drop 30-50% by your 40s, and the brain pays the price. Learn what the clinical research shows about CoQ10 and cognitive function after 40.
tags: CoQ10, brain health, cognitive function, women over 40, mitochondria, energy, brain tonic
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: CoQ10 is essential for mitochondrial energy production, and the brain uses 20% of the body's total energy supply. Research shows supplementing with liposomal CoQ10 can improve memory, reduce mental fatigue, and protect neurons from age-related oxidative damage.
